JPMorgan Chase & Co. tested artificial intelligence (AI) agents that allocate capital between stocks in response to changing market conditions, and it found that all eight agents beat both the traditional 60/40 portfolio and the bank’s own rules-based market regime model, Bloomberg reported Friday (July 10). Platforms & Products.title: Smallest standalone bank in America fails
Platforms & Products.summary: The failure of Kentland Federal Savings and Loan, the nation's smallest standalone bank at $3.7 million of assets, will cause an estimated $1.2 million hit to the deposit insurance fund, according to the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. Kentland's failure is the third bank failure in 2026.

Platforms & Products.title: Circle is granted a trust bank charter from the OCC
Platforms & Products.summary: The stablecoin issuer has received final approval from the federal agency to open a trust bank division for custody of digital assets.

Platforms & Products.title: FirstSun joins list of banks hit by borrower fraud
Platforms & Products.summary: The Denver-based bank reported that two loans soured, one due to fraud. A number of other lenders reported sizable fraud-related losses last fall.

Platforms & Products.title: Custodia asks Supreme Court to rule on Fed master account
Platforms & Products.summary: The Wyoming digital asset bank is requesting that the high court review previous decisions granting the central bank 'unbounded, unreviewable discretion' in light of its recent Cook and Slaughter rulings. A decision could impact how cryptocurrency intersects with the standard banking system.

Platforms & Products.title: How a serial borrower fooled 7 banks out of $39 million
Platforms & Products.summary: U.S. Bank, Arvest, Old National, BMO and WaFd took the losses in a decade-long scheme the DOJ announced.

Platforms & Products.title: Advisor wins U5 expungement after accusing Ameriprise of defamation
Platforms & Products.summary: Brooke Pilant, who was at Ameriprise from 2017 to 2024, accused the firm of turning against her after she raised concerns about "unethical practices."

Platforms & Products.title: Citi wins bank support for tokenized deposit tools
Platforms & Products.summary: Bangkok-based The Siam Commercial Bank will use the New York-based bank's 24/7 clearing and tokenized deposit service in a sign that the banking industry is beginning to look past individual tokenized deposit platforms and toward interoperability.

Platforms & Products.title: Bernanke joins Anthropic's oversight trust, JPMorgan inks NBA deal
Platforms & Products.summary: Anthropic appoints Former Federal Reserve Chair Ben Bernanke to its long-term benefit trust, JPMorganChase signs a multiyear agreement to be the official jersey patch and banking partner of the Dallas Mavericks, Brazil-based Nubank receives full regulatory approval to open Nu Mexico, and more in this week's banking news roundup.

Platforms & Products.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill
Platforms & Products.summary: The bill, which passed with wide bipartisan support, will become law at midnight if President Donald Trump doesn't veto it.

Platforms & Products.title: CFPB job cuts frozen until a new director is confirmed
Platforms & Products.summary: A federal judge has put on hold a plan for mass layoffs at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau until a new, permanent director is confirmed by the Senate. The judge's order ratifies an agreement on the issue between the CFPB and its union.

Regulation.summary: Yes& has acquired Modo Modo, adding B2B branding, omnichannel media and sales enablement services while expanding its Atlanta presence.
